title: Kaatre En Vaasal Vandhaai Lyrics Rhythm
stanzas: <div>Kaatre En Vaasal Vandhaai Song Lyrics Rhythm

[Kaatre en vaasal vandhaai
medhuvaaga kadhavu thirandhai
kaatre un peyarai kaetten
kadhal endraai

netru nee engu irundhaai
kaatre nee solvaai endren
swasaththil irundhathaaga
solli chendraai

thulli varum kaatre
thulli varum kaatre
thaaimozhi paesu
nilam ulla varaiyil
nilam ulla varaiyil
nenjinil veesu

thulli varum kaatre
thulli varum kaatre
thaai mozhi paesu ] (2)

Kaatre en vaasal vandhaai
medhuvaaga kadhavu thirandhai
kaatre un peyarai kaetten
kadhal endraai

kaarkaalam azhaikkumpodhu
olindhukolla idam vendum
thaavani kudai pidipaayaa

anbae naan uranga vendum
azhagaana idam vendum
kangalil idam koduppaayaa

nee en arugil vandhu neliya
naan un manadhil sendru oliya
nee un manadhil en uruvam
kandupidippaaya!!

pookkalukulle thaen
ulla varaiyil
kadhalar vazhga(2)

boomikku maele
vaan ulla varaiyil
kadhalum vazhga

Kaatre en vaasal vandhaai
medhuvaaga kadhavu thirandhai
kaatre un peyarai kaetten
kadhal endraai

netru nee engu irundhaai
kaatre nee solvaai endren
swasaththil irundhathaaga
solli chendraai

nedunkaalam sirpikkule
urundu nirkkum
muththup pol
en penmai thirandhu
nirkkiradhe...

thirakkaatha sirippi
ennai thirandhukolla
solgiradhaa
en nenjam arandu
nirkkiradhe..

naan siragodinthen
endru ninaithaen
un varugaiyinaal
vayatharindhen
enai marubadiyum
siru pillaiyaai seivaayaa!!

kattilidum vayathil
thottilida sonnaal
sariyaa sariyaa (2)

kattilil iruvarum
kuzhandhaigal aanaal
pizhaiya pizhaiyaa

Kaatre en vaasal vandhaai

kaatre un peyarai kaetten
kadhal endraai

netru nee engu irundhaai
kaatre nee solvaai endren
swasaththil irundhathaaga
solli chendraai

thulli varum kaatre
thulli varum kaatre
thaaimozhi paesu
nilam ulla varaiyil
nilam ulla varaiyil
nenjinil veesu

thulli varum kaatre
thulli varum kaatre

enrichedMetadata.faq:
Frequently Asked Questions

What is the theme of Kaatre En Vaasal Vandhaai?

The song beautifully explores themes of love and longing, capturing the emotions of a romantic relationship.

Who composed the music for the song?

AR Rahman composed the music for Kaatre En Vaasal Vandhaai.

In which movie does this song appear?

The song is featured in the movie Rhythm.

Who are the singers of this song?

The song is sung by Kavita Krishnamurthy and Unnikrishnan.

When was the song released?

The song was released in the year 2000.
enrichedMetadata.summary: In the movie Rhythm, Kaatre En Vaasal Vandhaai is a poignant expression of love and yearning. The song captures the delicate emotions of a couple as they navigate their feelings for each other. With its soothing melody and heartfelt lyrics by Vairamuthu, it evokes a sense of nostalgia and romance. AR Rahman's composition adds depth, making it a timeless piece that resonates with listeners. The song's gentle rhythm and evocative vocals create a serene and reflective atmosphere.
enrichedMetadata.high_ctr_intro: Kaatre En Vaasal Vandhaai from the movie Rhythm is a mesmerizing melody that beautifully captures the essence of love and longing. With the soulful voices of Kavita Krishnamurthy and Unnikrishnan, combined with AR Rahman's magical composition, this song is a timeless classic. Experience the poetic brilliance of Vairamuthu as you get lost in this enchanting musical journey.
stanzaMeanings: Wind, you came to my door, gently opened it. I asked your name, you said it was love.
Where were you yesterday, wind? I asked you to tell me, you said you were in my breath.
The playful wind, the playful wind, speaks the mother tongue, as long as there is land, it blows in the heart.
The playful wind, the playful wind, speaks the mother tongue.
Wind, you came to my door, gently opened it. I asked your name, you said it was love.
When the rainy season calls, a place to hide is needed. Will you hold the umbrella?
My dear, I need to sleep, I need a beautiful place. Will you give me a place in your eyes?
Will you come close to me, and I will go into your heart? Will you find my image in your heart?
As long as there is honey in flowers, let lovers live.
As long as there is sky above the earth, let love live.
Wind, you came to my door, gently opened it. I asked your name, you said it was love.
Where were you yesterday, wind? I asked you to tell me, you said you were in my breath.
Like a pearl resting inside a sculpture for a long time, my femininity is revealed.
A smile that doesn't open up, is it asking me to open up? My heart is confused.
I thought I had wings, but your arrival made me realize. Will you make me a child again?
Is it right to say cradle at the age of bed?
If two people become children in bed, is it a mistake?
Wind, you came to my door, gently opened it. I asked your name, you said it was love.
Where were you yesterday, wind? I asked you to tell me, you said you were in my breath.
The playful wind, the playful wind, speaks the mother tongue, as long as there is land, it blows in the heart.
The playful wind, the playful wind, speaks the mother tongue.
